recommendations.title: The Trust
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Drama, Crime, Action, Comedy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: A pair of cops investigating a drug invasion stumble upon a mysterious bank vault.

recommendations.title: Say 'I Love You'

recommendations.title: Texas Killing Fields
recommendations.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Fog
recommendations.overview: A gripping and chilling thriller that brings us to a hazy mountain village where an enigmatic detective is investigating the sudden disappearance of fifteen-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
recommendations.overview: A tourist witnesses a murder and finds herself caught up in a series of bloody killings.

recommendations.title: Cure

recommendations.title: The Alphabet Killer
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of double killings occurring in Rochester, NY during the 80’s and the troubled police officer determined to solve them, with or without the help of her department

recommendations.title: Howling
recommendations.overview: A beat cop and his rookie partner investigate a series of killings that seem to be carried out by a mysterious wolfdog.
